title: SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES - 211info
text: WALLOWA EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT REGION 18 SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supervision and coordination for staffing the resource rooms in school districts. Offers Individualized Education Program (IEP) review, vision and hearing screening, developmental assessment, and supports for students with disabilities. 107 SW First Street Suite 105 Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 426-7600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-7600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wallowa County Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
